description: Calculate the hydraulic residence time (flushing time) for the Muncie reach of the White River during peak flood conditions using the HEC-RAS HDF5 result file (Muncie.p04.hdf). Write and execute a Python script to identify the timestamp of maximum discharge at the most downstream cross-section and calculate the total water volume at that time using the Average End Area method (V = Σ Li × (Ai + Ai+1)/2). Save the integration table including columns for RiverStation_Upstream, RiverStation_Downstream, ReachLength_ft, AvgArea_sqft, and SegmentVolume_cuft to ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/volume_integration.csv. Export a summary report containing the calculated Total Reach Volume (cu ft) and Hydraulic Residence Time (hours) to ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/residence_time_report.txt.
